---
title: "Data Centre Project Intelligence Weekly Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf: default
---

## Executive Metrics

Health Score: 64

Schedule Completion: 35.0%

Compliance Issues: 5

Procurement Risks: 1

## Critical Schedule Risks

| id | name | delay_probability | risk | mitigation |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| T-001 | Task 1 | 0.37 | yellow | Confirm vendor ETA and add recovery float for Task 1. |

## Procurement Risks

| id | material | supplier | eta | risk |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PO-1000 | Material 1 | Unspecified | 2026-07-17 | red |
